description_long: This is a modern hand axe featuring a robust, single-edged steel blade with a slightly curved cutting edge and a squared poll. The blade has a weathered, brownish finish, suggesting heavy-duty use or a protective coating. The handle is ergonomically designed, made from a composite material with a bright orange upper section for visibility and a black lower section with textured grip inserts for secure handling. The handle is slightly curved, enhancing control and comfort during use, and tapers towards the end for a better grip. The blade is securely mounted to the handle, likely using a molded or composite attachment method, typical of contemporary axes. A faint circular marking or logo is visible on the side of the blade, but no clear brand name is discernible.
description: A modern hand axe with a weathered steel blade and an ergonomic orange-and-black composite handle featuring textured grip inserts.
description_view_0: The axe is shown from the side, highlighting the full profile of the blade and the ergonomic, orange-and-black handle with visible grip inserts.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed from the top, showing the narrow blade edge and the oval cross-section of the handle.
description_view_2: The opposite side profile of the axe, displaying the blade and handle curvature, with grip details on the handle's underside.
description_view_3: The axe is seen from the handle end, emphasizing the straight alignment and the handle's black grip section.
attribute_handle_type: Curved ergonomic composite handle with orange and black coloration, textured rubber grip inserts, and an oval cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, slightly curved steel blade with a squared poll and a weathered finish; features a faint circular marking.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern composite molded attachment between blade and handle.
